response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio matches the reference JSON for 'Second Heaven' and 'Daikenkai' lyrics. 2. JSON Usage: Utilized lyrics for songs; manually transcribed the interlude and talking portions. Corrected song lyrics to match the performer's intentional meme pronunciation ('Sanbai Ice Cream'). 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are precisely anchored to vocal bursts. Applied aggressive truncation for the rapid-fire rap segments in 'Daikenkai' to avoid cascading delays.

subtitles.original: これをみんなで叫ぶのが夢だったんですよね
subtitles.english: It was my dream to shout this with everyone.

subtitles.original: ゴールドラッシュとね、どっちやろうかなって迷いましたらば、ちょっとセカンドヘブンにしました
subtitles.english: I was torn between this and Gold Rush, but I decided to go with Second Heaven.

subtitles.original: なんかボーカル縛りと言いながら、2曲英語っていう...
subtitles.english: Even though I said I'd stick to vocals, two of the songs are in English...

subtitles.original: Countdown.. eight.. seven.. six.. five.. four.. three.. two.. one
subtitles.english: Countdown.. eight.. seven.. six.. five.. four.. three.. two.. one

subtitles.original: サンバイアイスクリーム！
subtitles.english: Three times ice cream!

subtitles.original: みんなちゃんと見ました？
subtitles.english: Did everyone see that properly?

subtitles.original: もう1回やりますからね
subtitles.english: I'm going to do it again, okay?

subtitles.original: 正しい歌詞はぜひ調べてください
subtitles.english: Please look up the correct lyrics.

subtitles.original: 生きがいなんだ。サンバイアイスクリームって言うことが生きがいなんだ。
subtitles.english: It's what I live for. Saying "Three times ice cream!" is my reason for being.

subtitles.original: みんなはこの配信を見た後明日はポップンやりに行きましょうね
subtitles.english: Everyone, after watching this stream, let's go play Pop'n tomorrow.

subtitles.original: 人の配信見てるとやりたくなりますからね
subtitles.english: Watching someone else's stream makes you want to play it yourself.

subtitles.original: ちょっと恥ずかしいんですけど手元見られてんの
subtitles.english: It's a bit embarrassing having you watch my hands.

subtitles.original: サンバイアイスクリーム！
subtitles.english: Three times ice cream!

subtitles.original: 急に叫ぶよ
subtitles.english: I'll shout it out of nowhere.

subtitles.original: ちょっとここむずい
subtitles.english: This part is a bit hard.

subtitles.original: ありがとうございました
subtitles.english: Thank you very much.

subtitles.original: みんなでサンバイアイスクリームが言えて幸せだ
subtitles.english: I'm so happy we could all say "Three times ice cream!" together.

subtitles.original: いや本当にありがとうございました
subtitles.english: No, really, thank you so much.

subtitles.original: あ、待ってでも3曲終わっちゃった
subtitles.english: Ah, wait, the three songs are already over.

subtitles.original: 終わっちゃってよー
subtitles.english: They're already finished!

subtitles.original: 楽しかったー
subtitles.english: That was so much fun!

subtitles.original: 今日はね、あの3曲しか遊べないので、ここで終わってしまうんですけど...
subtitles.english: Today, since I can only play three songs, it's going to end here...

subtitles.original: 実況プレイはここで終わっちゃうんですけど
subtitles.english: The gameplay part ends here, but...

subtitles.original: やだやだ！ポップンと離れたくないよー！
subtitles.english: No, no! I don't want to leave Pop'n!

subtitles.original: フレア今日はもうポップンする！
subtitles.english: Flare is going to keep playing Pop'n today!

subtitles.original: ポップンと離れたくないよー！
subtitles.english: I don't want to leave Pop'n behind!

subtitles.original: ポップンしたいよー！
subtitles.english: I want to play Pop'n!

subtitles.original: まあないものしょうがないか
subtitles.english: Well, it can't be helped if it's over.

subtitles.original: ちょっと切り替えていきますか
subtitles.english: Let's shift gears a bit.

subtitles.original: この後もみんなの好きな一番いい曲たくさん歌いますので
subtitles.english: After this, I'll be singing many of everyone's favorite best songs.

subtitles.original: ちょっと楽しみにこの後も見ていただけたら嬉しいなって思います
subtitles.english: So I hope you'll look forward to watching what's coming next.

subtitles.original: じゃあみんな次に行くぞ
subtitles.english: Alright everyone, let's move on to the next one!

subtitles.original: 次の曲は...
subtitles.english: The next song is...
